title: Lesson Learned
overview: Ten-year-old Palkó has just moved home to Budapest from Berlin and observes the daily life of an ordinary Hungarian elementary school with confused amazement. Juci, the young teacher just started working there. She is the only one who understands Palkó, as in their own way, they are both suffering from the same, sometimes grotesque educational system.

trailers.title: Bálint Szimler and Paul Mátis on Lesson Learned | New Directors/New Films 2025
